name: Coconut Milk Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the sugar and eggs until pale in color, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the canned coconut milk and beat until combined.
3. Freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions for an ice cream maker.
4. Serve immediately or store in the freezer.
TIPS: You may need extra time for hardening if your ice cream freezes into a soft texture. A high-quality ice cream can be used as a substitute if you don't have the necessary equipment.
